title: Flowers Bouquet Building Set, 12 Artificial Black Roses Botanical Collection Building Block Educational Toys Gift for Girls Kids Women Valentines Mothers Day Halloween, 634 PCS
features: CREATIVE DIY BOUQUET BUILDING SET-- This flower bouquet building block set delivers an engaging and rewarding construction experience for kids aged 6+. With 634 colorful pieces, young builders can craft a vibrant, intricate floral arrangement while developing creativity and fine motor skills

GOTHIC HOME DECOR-- Trans form your space with our floral stunning flower bouquet kit arrangement (vase not included), the perfect accent piece for both home and office settings. featuring lifelike petal details and rich, warm hues, this beautiful bouquet plant brings everlasting elegance that never fades. each vibrant blossom adds a pop of color to brighten any occasion, while the unique color variations create an air of sophistication in every corner

EXQUISITE BLACK ROSE FLOWER BOUQUET -- 12 Realistic artificial roses building block set with adjustable stems & petals for home decor‌ crafted with meticulous detail, this black rose bouquet replicates natural growth stages through sculpted petals and lifelike green stems. each rose features ‌swingable petals and leaves‌ for dynamic posing, allowing you to create gothic-inspired arrangements that capture elegance in motion. customize stem lengths effortlessly to fit any vase

PERFECT GIFT CHOICE -- Presented in a beautifully designed box, this flower plant building toys set is a great gift for loved ones. You can express your love for families, mothers, kids,lovers, girlfriends with this Roses building block set. This never-fade floral building set symbolizes enduring beauty, that is a meaningful present for flower lovers on birthday, Christmas, New Year’s, Valentine's Day, Easter, Mother's Day, Children's Day, Thanksgiving Day, Weddings or any anniversary etc

REST ASSURED PURCHASE -- This premium flower bouquet building block set features blocks crafted from safe, odorless ABS plastic with a smooth finish, ensuring seamless connections for a flawless assembly experience. each kit includes easy-to-follow color-coded instructions and exquisite gift box. our dedicated after-sales support provides prompt assistance for any inquiries—contact us freely for help. Note: the black rose bouquet kit does not include a vase
description: Product Description VIVID ARTIFICIAL BLACK ROSE FLOWER BUILDING TOY SET - AN EVERLASTING BLOOM GOTHIC HOME DECOR - MYSTERIOUS AND ELEGANT BLACK ROSE BOUQUET • Capture a moment of dramatic beauty forever: This elegant Botanical Bouquet Building Blocks set is more than home decor; it's a symbol of enduring allure, perfect for adding a touch of mysterious romance to any room. • For the Gothic Soul: Embrace the Dark Elegance. This artificial black rose bouquet building block set is a perfect match for enthusiasts of Gothic style and dark aesthetics. WHERE NATURE MEETS ARTISTRY - A DESIGN INSPIRED BY THE REAL BLACK ROSE • Witness the Journey of a Bloom: This DIY botanical building block toys set features three progressive blooming stages (bud, partial, full) to create a display of dynamic, lifelike beauty. • Eternal Beauty: This vivid artificial flower building toy combines the joy of creative assembly with enduring beauty that never fades, offering a truly hassle-free experience. • Crafted with Premium Materials for Lasting Quality: This bouquet building kids educational toys set is designed for effortless assembly and a sturdy construction, ensuring your beautiful creation remains stable and intact long after it's built. EASILY CUSTOMIZE YOUR PLANT BOUQUET BUILDING BLOCK SET TO PERFECTLY MATCH ANY VASE • Design Your Perfect Arrangement: Adjust the stems to create varying heights, ensuring your black rose bouquet set complements any vase or decor. • Find Your Perfect Angle: Adjust the petals and leaves of the bouquet set to showcase the elegance of the roses from any angle, creating a stunning display from every perspective. BUILDING BLOCK SET FOR KIDS & ADULTS, AGES 6+ • Adult Bouquet Building Blocks Set: A sophisticated building experience focused on detail and romance, Enjoy quality time together while constructing a beautiful symbol of your love. • The Ultimate Parent-Child Activity Kit: Looking for a fun and meaningful way to spend time with your kids? Our DIY plant bouquet set is the answer! Build, create, and laugh together as you assemble a unique floral illustration. It's the perfect screen-free activity to spark creativity and make unforgettable memories. A THOUGHTFUL GIFT FOR YOUR BELOVED PARTNER AND FAMILY Unlike fresh flowers, this botanical collection set captures beauty that lasts a lifetime, symbolizing an eternal love. It serves as a deeply meaningful gift for holidays like Christmas, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Halloween, New year, or birthdays. Moreover, this flower building playset is a creatively enriching project for children and teens ages 6+, beautifully blending educational play with aesthetic appeal.
